ACCESS_SCOPE_READ_ARTIFACTS_005.sql: select contract_id, submitted from artifacts where id=%s

ACCESS_SCOPE_READ_CONFIGURATION_VERSIONS.sql: select 1 from configuration_active_versions a join configuration_versions v on v.id=a.configuration_version_id where a.contract_id=%s limit 1

ACCESS_SCOPE_READ_CONTRACTS_001.sql: select agency_organization_id, ngo_organization_id from contracts where id=%s

ACCESS_SCOPE_READ_CONTRACT_ROLE_ASSIGNME.sql:
select 1
               from contract_role_assignments a
               join users u on u.id=a.user_id
               where a.contract_id=%s and a.user_id=%s and a.role=%s
                 and a.agency_organization_id=%s
                 and u.organization_id=%s and u.role=%s and u.active=true

ACCESS_SCOPE_READ_EXTRACTION_RUNS_007.sql: select contract_id from extraction_runs where id=%s

ACCESS_SCOPE_READ_GOVERNMENT_QUEUE_ITEMS.sql:
select iv.contract_id, q.status
               from government_queue_items q
               join submissions s on s.id=q.submission_id
               join invoice_versions iv on iv.id=s.invoice_version_id
               where q.id=%s

ACCESS_SCOPE_READ_INGESTION_JOBS_006.sql: select contract_id from ingestion_jobs where id=%s

ACCESS_SCOPE_READ_INVOICE_VERSIONS_004.sql: select contract_id, state from invoice_versions where id=%s

ACCESS_SCOPE_READ_INVOICE_VERSIONS_009.sql: select 1 from invoice_versions where contract_id=%s and state <> 'draft' limit 1

ARTIFACTS_READ_ARTIFACTS_002.sql: select organization_id, artifact_kind from artifacts where id=%s

ARTIFACTS_READ_ARTIFACTS_005.sql:
select id, contract_id, organization_id, agency_organization_id, object_key,
                      filename, media_type, byte_size, sha256, artifact_kind, created_by, submitted
               from artifacts where id=%s

ARTIFACTS_READ_CONTRACTS_001.sql: select agency_organization_id, ngo_organization_id from contracts where id=%s

ARTIFACTS_WRITE_ARTIFACTS_003.sql:
insert into artifacts
                       (id, contract_id, organization_id, agency_organization_id, object_key,
                        filename, media_type, byte_size, sha256, artifact_kind, created_by)
                       values (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s)

ATTESTATION_READ_ARTIFACTS_INVOICE_LINES.sql:
select a.id,a.sha256 from artifacts a where a.id in
                                     (select ledger_artifact_id from invoice_lines where invoice_version_id=%s union select evidence_artifact_id from invoice_lines where invoice_version_id=%s) order by a.id

ATTESTATION_READ_ATTESTATIONS_012.sql:
select id,validation_run_id,material_revision,invoice_fingerprint,actor_id,actor_role,attestation_version,attestation_text,created_at
                                  from attestations where invoice_version_id=%s order by created_at desc,id desc limit 1

ATTESTATION_READ_INVOICE_LINES_002.sql:
select expense_key,expense_date,budget_category,claimed_amount,ledger_artifact_id,evidence_artifact_id,extraction_status
                                   from invoice_lines where invoice_version_id=%s order by expense_key

ATTESTATION_READ_INVOICE_LINES_007.sql: select count(distinct evidence_artifact_id) from invoice_lines where invoice_version_id=%s and evidence_artifact_id is not null

ATTESTATION_READ_INVOICE_VERSIONS_008.sql: select organization_id,state,material_revision from invoice_versions where id=%s

ATTESTATION_READ_INVOICE_VERSIONS_010.sql: select contract_id from invoice_versions where id=%s

ATTESTATION_READ_INVOICE_VERSIONS_011.sql: select organization_id,material_revision from invoice_versions where id=%s

ATTESTATION_READ_VALIDATION_RUNS_004.sql: select input_hash,output_hash,material_revision from validation_runs where id=%s

ATTESTATION_READ_VALIDATION_RUNS_006.sql:
select id,output_hash,material_revision,created_at from validation_runs
                                  where invoice_version_id=%s and engine_version is not null order by created_at desc,id desc limit 1

AUTHENTICATION_READ_ORGANIZATIONS_SESSIO.sql:
select u.id, u.organization_id, u.display_name, u.email, u.role, o.name
               from sessions s join users u on u.id = s.user_id
               join organizations o on o.id = u.organization_id
               where s.token_hash = %s and s.revoked_at is null and s.expires_at > now() and u.active

AUTHENTICATION_READ_ORGANIZATIONS_USERS_.sql:
select u.id, u.organization_id, u.display_name, u.email, u.role,
                      u.password_hash, o.name
               from users u join organizations o on o.id = u.organization_id
               where lower(u.email) = lower(%s) and u.active

AUTHENTICATION_READ_USERS_009.sql: select organization_id from users where id=%s

AUTHENTICATION_WRITE_SESSIONS_004.sql: insert into sessions(id, token_hash, user_id, expires_at) values (%s, %s, %s, %s)

AUTHENTICATION_WRITE_SESSIONS_007.sql: update sessions set revoked_at = now() where token_hash = %s and revoked_at is null returning user_id

BUDGET_READ_CONFIGURATION_VERSIONS_002.sql: select version,payload from configuration_versions where id=%s

BUDGET_READ_CONTRACTS_INVOICE_VERSIONS_0.sql:
select i.configuration_version_id,i.organization_id,i.state,c.agency_organization_id,c.ngo_organization_id
                                      from invoice_versions i join contracts c on c.id=i.contract_id where i.id=%s

BUDGET_READ_INVOICE_LINES_003.sql: select budget_category,sum(claimed_amount) from invoice_lines where invoice_version_id=%s group by budget_category

CONFIGURATION_READ_CONFIGURATION_DRAFTS_.sql: select payload from configuration_drafts where contract_id=%s

CONFIGURATION_READ_CONFIGURATION_VERSION.sql: select coalesce(max(version), 0) + 1 from configuration_versions where contract_id=%s
select v.id,v.version,a.activated_at from configuration_active_versions a join configuration_versions v on v.id=a.configuration_version_id where a.contract_id=%s

CONFIGURATION_READ_CONFIGURATION_APPROVA.sql:
select v.contract_id,v.version,v.payload,e.state,te.id,te.payload_hash,te.result_hash,te.suite_version,ap.id,ap.approval_hash,e.rollback_target_version_id
               from configuration_versions v
               join lateral (select state,rollback_target_version_id from configuration_lifecycle_events where configuration_version_id=v.id order by sequence desc limit 1) e on true
               left join configuration_test_evidence te on te.configuration_version_id=v.id
               left join configuration_approvals ap on ap.configuration_version_id=v.id
               where v.id=%s

CONFIGURATION_READ_CONFIGURATION_ACTIVE_.sql: select configuration_version_id from configuration_active_versions where contract_id=%s for update

select v.id,v.version,v.payload,e.state,e.action,e.actor_id,e.actor_role,e.actor_organization_id,e.rationale,e.test_evidence_id,e.approval_id,e.predecessor_version_id,e.successor_version_id,e.rollback_target_version_id,e.event_hash,e.occurred_at,(a.configuration_version_id=v.id)
               from configuration_versions v join configuration_lifecycle_events e on e.configuration_version_id=v.id
               left join configuration_active_versions a on a.contract_id=v.contract_id
               where v.contract_id=%s order by v.version,e.sequence

CONFIGURATION_WRITE_CONFIGURATION_DRAFTS.sql:
insert into configuration_drafts(contract_id, payload, updated_by)
                   values (%s, %s, %s)
                   on conflict (contract_id) do update set payload=excluded.payload,
                   updated_by=excluded.updated_by, updated_at=now()

CONFIGURATION_WRITE_CONFIGURATION_ACTIVE.sql: update configuration_active_versions set configuration_version_id=%s,activated_by=%s,activated_at=now(),predecessor_version_id=%s,rollback_target_version_id=%s where contract_id=%s and configuration_version_id=%s

EXTRACTION_REVIEW_READ_ARTIFACTS_EXTRACT.sql:
select r.id,r.source_artifact_id,a.filename,r.provider,r.model,r.status,r.routing_reason,
                      f.id,f.field_name,f.proposed_value,f.reviewed_value,f.confidence,f.source_location,f.review_status
               from extraction_runs r join artifacts a on a.id=r.source_artifact_id
               join extraction_fields f on f.extraction_run_id=r.id
               where r.contract_id=%s and r.status='needs_review' order by r.created_at,f.field_name

EXTRACTION_REVIEW_READ_EXTRACTION_FIELDS.sql: select reviewed_value,review_status from extraction_fields where id=%s

select f.proposed_value,f.review_status,f.source_location,f.proposed_lineage_id,f.field_name,
                          r.id,r.source_artifact_id,r.contract_id,r.organization_id,r.provider,r.model,r.prompt_version,r.parser_version
                   from extraction_fields f join extraction_runs r on r.id=f.extraction_run_id
                   where f.id=%s for update
select r.id from extraction_fields f join extraction_runs r on r.id=f.extraction_run_id where f.id=%s

FINDING_RESOLUTION_READ_FIELD_LINEAGE_00.sql: select id from field_lineage where invoice_version_id=%s and field_name=%s order by id desc limit 1

FINDING_RESOLUTION_READ_INVOICE_LINES_00.sql: select id,expense_date,ledger_artifact_id,ledger_source_location from invoice_lines where invoice_version_id=%s and expense_key=%s for update

FINDING_RESOLUTION_READ_INVOICE_LINES_VA.sql:
select f.id,f.expense_key,f.code,f.severity,f.message,f.status,r.normalized_input,l.evidence_artifact_id
                                   from validation_findings f join validation_results r on r.id=f.validation_result_id
                                   left join invoice_lines l on l.invoice_version_id=f.invoice_version_id and l.expense_key=f.expense_key
                                   where f.validation_run_id=%s order by f.severity,f.code

FINDING_RESOLUTION_READ_INVOICE_VERSIONS.sql: select contract_id from invoice_versions where id=%s

select f.invoice_version_id,f.expense_key,f.code,f.severity,f.status,i.organization_id
                                      from validation_findings f join invoice_versions i on i.id=f.invoice_version_id where f.id=%s

FINDING_RESOLUTION_READ_VALIDATION_FINDI.sql: select exists(select 1 from validation_findings where validation_run_id=%s and severity='blocker' and status='open')

FINDING_RESOLUTION_READ_VALIDATION_RUNS_.sql: select id from validation_runs where invoice_version_id=%s and engine_version is not null order by created_at desc,id desc limit 1

FINDING_RESOLUTION_WRITE_INVOICE_LINES_0.sql: update invoice_lines set expense_date=%s where id=%s

FINDING_RESOLUTION_WRITE_INVOICE_VERSION.sql: update invoice_versions set material_revision=material_revision+1 where id=%s

FINDING_RESOLUTION_WRITE_VALIDATION_FIND.sql: update validation_findings set status='dismissed' where validation_run_id=%s and code=%s
update validation_findings set status=%s where id=%s

GOVERNMENT_DECISION_READ_GOVERNMENT_DECI.sql: select 1 from government_decisions d join submissions s on s.id=d.submission_id join invoice_versions i on i.id=s.invoice_version_id where i.contract_id=%s and d.decision='returned'

select 1 from government_decisions d join submissions s on s.id=d.submission_id join invoice_versions i on i.id=s.invoice_version_id
                    where i.contract_id=%s and d.decision='returned' and i.version < %s

GOVERNMENT_DECISION_READ_GOVERNMENT_QUEU.sql: select status from government_queue_items where id=%s for update

select q.status,q.agency_organization_id,q.ngo_organization_id,s.id,s.invoice_version_id,s.package_id,iv.version,iv.contract_id
          from government_queue_items q join submissions s on s.id=q.submission_id join invoice_versions iv on iv.id=s.invoice_version_id where q.id=%s

GOVERNMENT_DECISION_READ_USERS_002.sql: select role,organization_id from users where id=%s

GOVERNMENT_DECISION_WRITE_GOVERNMENT_QUE.sql: update government_queue_items set status=%s where id=%s

GOVERNMENT_DECISION_WRITE_INVOICE_VERSIO.sql: update invoice_versions set state=%s where id=%s

GOVERNMENT_REVIEW_READ_ARTIFACTS_PACKAGE.sql: select pa.path,pa.artifact_id,pa.sha256,a.media_type from package_artifacts pa join artifacts a on a.id=pa.artifact_id where pa.package_id=%s order by pa.path

GOVERNMENT_REVIEW_READ_CONFIGURATION_VER.sql:
select q.id,q.status,o.name,c.name,iv.version,iv.total,s.submitted_at,s.id,p.id,p.zip_artifact_id,
                 cv.payload->'servicePeriod',count(vf.id) filter(where vf.status='open')
          from government_queue_items q join submissions s on s.id=q.submission_id join invoice_versions iv on iv.id=s.invoice_version_id
          join contracts c on c.id=iv.contract_id join organizations o on o.id=q.ngo_organization_id join packages p on p.id=s.package_id
          join configuration_versions cv on cv.id=iv.configuration_version_id
          left join validation_findings vf on vf.invoice_version_id=iv.id
          where q.agency_organization_id=%s group by q.id,o.name,c.name,iv.version,iv.total,s.submitted_at,s.id,p.id,p.zip_artifact_id,cv.payload order by s.submitted_at

GOVERNMENT_REVIEW_READ_CONTRACTS_GOVERNM.sql:
select q.status,s.invoice_version_id,s.package_id,p.zip_artifact_id,s.package_hashes,iv.configuration_version_id,iv.version,iv.total,o.name,c.name,s.submitted_at
          from government_queue_items q join submissions s on s.id=q.submission_id join packages p on p.id=s.package_id join invoice_versions iv on iv.id=s.invoice_version_id join organizations o on o.id=q.ngo_organization_id join contracts c on c.id=iv.contract_id
          where q.id=%s and q.agency_organization_id=%s

GOVERNMENT_REVIEW_READ_DOMAIN_EVENTS_006.sql: select event_type,actor_id,occurred_at,payload from domain_events where aggregate_id in (%s,%s,%s) order by occurred_at,id

GOVERNMENT_REVIEW_READ_VALIDATION_FINDIN.sql: select code,severity,message,status,expense_key from validation_findings where validation_run_id=%s order by code

GOVERNMENT_REVIEW_READ_VALIDATION_RUNS_0.sql: select id,engine_version,input_hash,output_hash from validation_runs where invoice_version_id=%s order by created_at desc limit 1

INGESTION_READ_ARTIFACTS_INGESTION_JOBS_.sql:
select j.id,j.artifact_id,j.contract_id,j.organization_id,j.job_type,j.status,
                          j.attempt_count,j.error_code,j.error_message
                   from ingestion_jobs j join artifacts a on a.id=j.artifact_id
                   where j.contract_id=%s and j.organization_id=%s and a.sha256=%s and a.filename=%s and j.job_type=%s

INGESTION_READ_INGESTION_JOBS_003.sql:
select id,artifact_id,contract_id,organization_id,job_type,status,attempt_count,error_code,error_message
               from ingestion_jobs where contract_id=%s order by created_at

INGESTION_WRITE_INGESTION_JOBS_004.sql:
with next as (
                 select id from ingestion_jobs where status='queued' order by created_at for update skip locked limit 1
               ) update ingestion_jobs j set status='running', started_at=now(), attempt_count=attempt_count+1
               from next where j.id=next.id
               returning j.id,j.artifact_id,j.contract_id,j.organization_id,j.job_type,j.status,
                         j.attempt_count,j.error_code,j.error_message

INGESTION_WRITE_INGESTION_JOBS_005.sql: update ingestion_jobs set status='completed', completed_at=now(), error_code=null, error_message=null where id=%s and status='running'

INGESTION_WRITE_INGESTION_JOBS_006.sql: update ingestion_jobs set status='failed', completed_at=now(), error_code='PROCESSING_FAILED', error_message=%s where id=%s and status='running'

INVOICE_DRAFT_READ_ARTIFACTS_008.sql:
select id from artifacts where contract_id=%s and organization_id=%s and filename=%s
                       order by created_at desc limit 1

INVOICE_DRAFT_READ_CONFIGURATION_VERSION.sql: select v.id,v.payload from configuration_active_versions a join configuration_versions v on v.id=a.configuration_version_id where a.contract_id=%s
select payload from configuration_versions where id=%s

INVOICE_DRAFT_READ_DRAFT_ASSEMBLIES_003.sql: select invoice_version_id from draft_assemblies where ledger_import_id=%s and configuration_version_id=%s

INVOICE_DRAFT_READ_EXPENSE_ROWS_004.sql:
select id,expense_key,expense_date,vendor,description,budget_category,amount,evidence_filename,
                          source_artifact_id,source_sheet,source_cells->>'amount',source_cells->>'expense_date',source_cells->>'description',mapping_version
                   from expense_rows where ledger_import_id=%s order by source_row

INVOICE_DRAFT_READ_EXTRACTION_FIELDS_EXT.sql:
select f.id,f.proposed_value,f.reviewed_value,f.review_status
                           from extraction_fields f join extraction_runs r on r.id=f.extraction_run_id
                           where r.source_artifact_id=%s and f.field_name='amount' order by r.created_at desc limit 1

INVOICE_DRAFT_READ_FIELD_LINEAGE_011.sql: select id from field_lineage where field_name=%s and source_artifact_id=%s order by id desc limit 1

INVOICE_DRAFT_READ_INVOICE_FINDINGS_016.sql: select expense_key,code,message,status from invoice_findings where invoice_version_id=%s order by code,expense_key

INVOICE_DRAFT_READ_INVOICE_LINES_014.sql:
select expense_key,expense_date,vendor,description,budget_category,claimed_amount,ledger_artifact_id,
                      ledger_source_location,evidence_artifact_id,extraction_status from invoice_lines where invoice_version_id=%s order by expense_key

INVOICE_DRAFT_READ_INVOICE_VERSIONS_005.sql: select coalesce(max(version),0)+1 from invoice_versions where contract_id=%s

INVOICE_DRAFT_READ_INVOICE_VERSIONS_017.sql: select id from invoice_versions where contract_id=%s and state='draft' order by version desc limit 1

INVOICE_DRAFT_READ_LEDGER_IMPORTS_001.sql: select id from ledger_imports where contract_id=%s and organization_id=%s order by created_at desc limit 1

LEDGER_IMPORT_READ_CONFIGURATION_VERSION.sql: select v.payload from configuration_active_versions a join configuration_versions v on v.id=a.configuration_version_id where a.contract_id=%s

LEDGER_IMPORT_READ_LEDGER_IMPORTS_001.sql: select id,row_count,control_total,imported_total from ledger_imports where artifact_id=%s

PACKAGE_GENERATION_READ_INVOICE_VERSIONS.sql: select organization_id,contract_id,version from invoice_versions where id=%s

PACKAGE_GENERATION_READ_VALIDATION_RUNS_.sql: select id,engine_version,input_hash,output_hash from validation_runs where id=%s

PROVENANCE_READ_ARTIFACTS_ARTIFACTS_ARTI.sql:
select e.id,e.event_type,e.actor_id,e.organization_id,e.aggregate_type,
                          e.aggregate_id,e.payload,e.occurred_at
                   from domain_events e
                   where e.contract_id=%s and (
                     (e.aggregate_type='artifact' and exists(
                       select 1 from artifacts a where a.id=e.aggregate_id and a.submitted=true))
                     or (e.aggregate_type='configuration_version' and exists(
                       select 1 from invoice_versions i
                       where i.configuration_version_id=e.aggregate_id and i.state<>'draft'))
                     or (e.aggregate_type='extraction_run' and exists(
                       select 1 from extraction_runs x join artifacts a on a.id=x.source_artifact_id
                       where x.id=e.aggregate_id and a.submitted=true))
                     or (e.aggregate_type='extraction_field' and exists(
                       select 1 from extraction_fields f join extraction_runs x on x.id=f.extraction_run_id
                       join artifacts a on a.id=x.source_artifact_id
                       where f.id=e.aggregate_id and a.submitted=true))
                     or (e.aggregate_type='validation_run' and exists(
                       select 1 from validation_runs v join invoice_versions i on i.id=v.invoice_version_id
                       where v.id=e.aggregate_id and i.state<>'draft'))
                     or (e.aggregate_type='invoice_line' and exists(
                       select 1 from invoice_lines l join invoice_versions i on i.id=l.invoice_version_id
                       where l.id=e.aggregate_id and i.state<>'draft'))
                     or (e.aggregate_type='validation_finding' and exists(
                       select 1 from validation_findings f join invoice_versions i on i.id=f.invoice_version_id
                       where f.id=e.aggregate_id and i.state<>'draft'))
                     or (e.aggregate_type='invoice_version' and exists(
                       select 1 from invoice_versions i where i.id=e.aggregate_id and i.state<>'draft'))
                     or (e.aggregate_type='package' and exists(
                       select 1 from packages p join invoice_versions i on i.id=p.invoice_version_id
                       where p.id=e.aggregate_id and i.state<>'draft'))
                   ) order by e.id

PROVENANCE_READ_ARTIFACTS_FIELD_LINEAGE_.sql:
select l.id,l.field_name,l.field_value,l.source_artifact_id,l.source_location,
                          l.importer_version,l.extractor_provider,l.extractor_model,l.prompt_version,
                          l.parser_version,l.mapping_version,l.correction_actor_id,l.correction_reason,
                          l.validation_run_id,l.invoice_version_id,l.package_artifact_id,
                          l.predecessor_lineage_id,l.recorded_at
                   from field_lineage l where l.contract_id=%s and (
                     (l.invoice_version_id is not null and exists(
                       select 1 from invoice_versions i
                       where i.id=l.invoice_version_id and i.state<>'draft'))
                     or (l.invoice_version_id is null and l.source_artifact_id is not null and exists(
                       select 1 from artifacts a where a.id=l.source_artifact_id and a.submitted=true))
                   ) order by l.id

PROVENANCE_READ_CONTRACTS_003.sql: select ngo_organization_id, agency_organization_id from contracts where id=%s

PROVENANCE_READ_DOMAIN_EVENTS_006.sql:
select id, event_type, actor_id, organization_id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, payload, occurred_at
                   from domain_events
                   where contract_id=%s or (contract_id is null and organization_id in (%s,%s)) order by id

PROVENANCE_READ_FIELD_LINEAGE_007.sql:
select id, field_name, field_value, source_artifact_id, source_location,
                          importer_version, extractor_provider, extractor_model, prompt_version,
                          parser_version, mapping_version, correction_actor_id, correction_reason,
                          validation_run_id, invoice_version_id, package_artifact_id,
                          predecessor_lineage_id, recorded_at
                   from field_lineage where contract_id=%s order by id

PROVENANCE_WRITE_DOMAIN_EVENTS_001.sql:
insert into domain_events
           (event_key,event_type,schema_version,actor_id,actor_role,actor_organization_id,organization_id,contract_id,aggregate_type,aggregate_id,payload,reason_code,version_references,event_hash)
           values (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s) returning id

PROVENANCE_WRITE_FIELD_LINEAGE_002.sql:
insert into field_lineage
           (contract_id,organization_id,field_name,field_value,source_artifact_id,
            source_location,importer_version,extractor_provider,extractor_model,
            prompt_version,parser_version,mapping_version,correction_actor_id,
            correction_reason,validation_run_id,invoice_version_id,
            package_artifact_id,predecessor_lineage_id)
           values (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s)
           returning id

REVISION_READ_GOVERNMENT_DECISIONS_INVOI.sql:
select l.successor_invoice_version_id,l.predecessor_invoice_version_id,d.id,d.reason_code,d.note,d.line_keys
          from invoice_version_links l join government_decisions d on d.id=l.government_decision_id join invoice_versions i on i.id=l.successor_invoice_version_id where i.contract_id=%s and i.state='draft' order by i.version desc limit 1

REVISION_READ_FIELD_LINEAGE_013.sql: select field_name,field_value,source_artifact_id,source_location,importer_version,extractor_provider,extractor_model,prompt_version,parser_version,mapping_version,package_artifact_id,id from field_lineage where invoice_version_id=%s order by id

REVISION_READ_INVOICE_LINES_009.sql: select description from invoice_lines where invoice_version_id=%s and expense_key=%s

REVISION_READ_INVOICE_VERSIONS_007.sql: select organization_id from invoice_versions where id=%s

REVISION_READ_INVOICE_VERSION_LINKS_001.sql: select successor_invoice_version_id from invoice_version_links where predecessor_invoice_version_id=%s

REVISION_WRITE_INVOICE_LINES_004.sql:
insert into invoice_lines(id,invoice_version_id,expense_row_id,expense_key,expense_date,vendor,description,budget_category,claimed_amount,ledger_artifact_id,ledger_source_location,evidence_artifact_id,extraction_field_id,extraction_status,mapping_version)
      select 'line-'||md5(random()::text||id),%s,expense_row_id,expense_key,expense_date,vendor,description,budget_category,claimed_amount,ledger_artifact_id,ledger_source_location,evidence_artifact_id,extraction_field_id,extraction_status,mapping_version from invoice_lines where invoice_version_id=%s

REVISION_WRITE_INVOICE_LINES_010.sql: update invoice_lines set description=%s where invoice_version_id=%s and expense_key=%s

REVISION_WRITE_INVOICE_VERSIONS_011.sql: update invoice_versions set material_revision=material_revision+1 where id=%s

SUBMISSION_READ_EXTRACTION_FIELDS_EXTRAC.sql:
select artifact_id from package_artifacts where package_id=%s
                union select ledger_artifact_id from invoice_lines where invoice_version_id=%s
                union select evidence_artifact_id from invoice_lines where invoice_version_id=%s and evidence_artifact_id is not null
                union select x.source_artifact_id from invoice_lines l join extraction_fields f on f.id=l.extraction_field_id
                  join extraction_runs x on x.id=f.extraction_run_id where l.invoice_version_id=%s
                union select x.raw_response_artifact_id from invoice_lines l join extraction_fields f on f.id=l.extraction_field_id
                  join extraction_runs x on x.id=f.extraction_run_id where l.invoice_version_id=%s and x.raw_response_artifact_id is not null

SUBMISSION_READ_PACKAGES_002.sql: select id,zip_artifact_id from packages where invoice_version_id=%s and attestation_id=%s

SUBMISSION_READ_PACKAGE_ARTIFACTS_003.sql: select path,sha256 from package_artifacts where package_id=%s order by path

SUBMISSION_WRITE_ARTIFACTS_009.sql:
update artifacts set submitted=true
                  where submitted=false and id = any(%s)

SUBMISSION_WRITE_INVOICE_VERSIONS_007.sql: update invoice_versions set state='submitted' where id=%s

VALIDATION_READ_CONFIGURATION_VERSIONS_0.sql: select payload from configuration_versions where id=%s

VALIDATION_READ_INVOICE_LINES_003.sql:
select expense_key,expense_date,vendor,budget_category,claimed_amount,evidence_artifact_id,ledger_source_location
                                        from invoice_lines where invoice_version_id=%s order by expense_key

VALIDATION_READ_VALIDATION_RESULTS_008.sql: select rule_code,rule_version,severity,reason_code,outcome,expense_key,normalized_input,message from validation_results where validation_run_id=%s order by rule_code,expense_key nulls first,reason_code

VALIDATION_READ_VALIDATION_RUNS_009.sql: select id from validation_runs where invoice_version_id=%s and engine_version is not null order by created_at desc,id desc limit 1

INVOICE_SNAPSHOTS_READ_INVOICE_SNAPSHOTS.sql: select id,payload,snapshot_hash from invoice_snapshots where invoice_version_id=%s and material_revision=%s and stage=%s

INVOICE_SNAPSHOTS_READ_ARTIFACTS_INVOICE.sql: select l.expense_key,l.expense_date,l.vendor,l.description,l.budget_category,l.claimed_amount,l.ledger_artifact_id,la.sha256,l.ledger_source_location,l.evidence_artifact_id,ea.sha256,l.extraction_status,l.mapping_version from invoice_lines l join artifacts la on la.id=l.ledger_artifact_id left join artifacts ea on ea.id=l.evidence_artifact_id where l.invoice_version_id=%s order by l.expense_key

PROVENANCE_READ_USERS_008.sql: select role,organization_id from users where id=%s

PROVENANCE_READ_DOMAIN_EVENTS_010.sql: select id,event_key,event_type,actor_id,actor_role,actor_organization_id,organization_id,contract_id,aggregate_type,aggregate_id,payload,schema_version,reason_code,version_references,event_hash,occurred_at from domain_events where id=any(%s) order by id

PROVENANCE_READ_INVOICE_SNAPSHOTS_012.sql: select s.id,s.invoice_version_id,s.invoice_version,s.material_revision,s.stage,s.payload,s.snapshot_hash,s.created_by,s.actor_role,s.created_at from invoice_snapshots s join invoice_versions i on i.id=s.invoice_version_id where s.contract_id=%s and (%s=false or i.state<>'draft') order by s.invoice_version,s.material_revision,s.stage

PROVENANCE_READ_PROVENANCE_RELATIONS_011.sql: select r.id,r.relation_type,r.source_reference,r.target_reference,r.actor_id,r.actor_role,r.actor_organization_id,r.reason_code,r.relation_hash,r.created_at from provenance_relations r where r.contract_id=%s and (%s=false or exists(select 1 from invoice_versions i where i.contract_id=r.contract_id and i.state<>'draft' and (r.source_reference->>'id'=i.id or r.target_reference->>'id'=i.id or exists(select 1 from invoice_snapshots sn where sn.invoice_version_id=i.id and (r.source_reference->>'id'=sn.id or r.target_reference->>'id'=sn.id)) or exists(select 1 from submissions su where su.invoice_version_id=i.id and (r.source_reference->>'id'=su.id or r.target_reference->>'id'=su.id or exists(select 1 from government_queue_items q join government_decisions d on d.queue_item_id=q.id where q.submission_id=su.id and (r.source_reference->>'id'=d.id or r.target_reference->>'id'=d.id))))))) order by r.created_at,r.id

PROVENANCE_WRITE_PROVENANCE_RELATIONS_00.sql: insert into provenance_relations(id,contract_id,organization_id,relation_type,source_reference,target_reference,schema_version,actor_id,actor_role,actor_organization_id,reason_code,relation_hash) values (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s) on conflict (relation_type,source_reference,target_reference) do nothing

WORKER_HEALTH_READ_WORKER_HEARTBEAT_001.sql: select last_seen_at from worker_heartbeat where worker_name = 'default'

WORKER_WRITE_WORKER_HEARTBEAT_001.sql: insert into worker_heartbeat(worker_name, last_seen_at) values ('default', %s) on conflict (worker_name) do update set last_seen_at = excluded.last_seen_at
